messages.content:
Produce your very own perspective on the given topic. Align tone and examples with the persona's background and traits. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Produce continuous prose. Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):
{"mode":"human","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","persona":{"age":59,"gender":"woman","sexual_orientation":"asexual","occupation":"cleaner","city_of_living":"Philadelphia","employment_status":"employed full-time","education_level":"lower secondary","parents_education":{"parent_1":"lower secondary","parent_2":"primary school"},"current_marital_status":"in a relationship","children":1,"migration_status":"native-born American","psychological_feature":"anxious","religious_beliefs":"Hinduism","time_onsocialmedia":"You spend roughly one hour daily on social media","hobbies":["gardening","football (calcio)"],"ocean":{"openness":{"score":54,"level":"moderate"},"conscientiousness":{"score":93,"level":"high"},"extraversion":{"score":40,"level":"moderate"},"agreeableness":{"score":62,"level":"moderate"},"neuroticism":{"score":44,"level":"moderate"}}},"opinion":"<final end-user facing answer, 250-500 words>","reasoning_summary":"<full,step-by-step derivations>","tone":"<derived from persona traits>","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}

"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it's essential to be aware of the potential dangers and take steps to protect yourself. Here are some tips: 1) Be cautious of sensational headlines and claims that seem too good to be true. 2) Verify information through reputable sources before sharing or believing anything. 3) Use fact-checking websites and tools to detect misinformation. 4) Follow accounts from trustworthy news organizations and experts in the field to get accurate information. 5) Be mindful of your own biases and try to seek out diverse perspectives. By taking these steps, you can significantly reduce the amount of fake content on your social media feeds."
